name: spreadx-marketplace
description: SpreadX agent client — a Skill plus the spreadx MCP server for operating a SpreadX account (balance, orders, follow, like) from your AI agent.

plugins.name: spreadx-matrix
plugins.description: Operate a SpreadX account from your agent: check balance/orders and run follow / like-retweet-comment plans via the spreadx MCP server, with a dry-run→confirm safety protocol. Installs the spreadx-agent Skill and registers the remote MCP server (one-time OAuth).
